'''âf-s-s''' ('''fasasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backscratch|backscratch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backscratch|backscratch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-s-s
|-
! Lemma
| fasasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fasasithi|fasasithi]] || [[word:fasasiji|fasasiji]] || [[word:fasasishi|fasasishi]] || [[word:fasasi|fasasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasasuthuth|fasasuthuth]] || [[word:fasasujuj|fasasujuj]] || [[word:fasasushush|fasasushush]] || [[word:fasas|fasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasasuthu|fasasuthu]] || [[word:fasasuju|fasasuju]] || [[word:fasasushu|fasasushu]] || [[word:fasasu|fasasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasasufuth|fasasufuth]] || [[word:fasasufuj|fasasufuj]] || [[word:fasasufush|fasasufush]] || [[word:fasasuf|fasasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fasasethe|fasasethe]] || [[word:fasaseje|fasaseje]] || [[word:fasaseshe|fasaseshe]] || [[word:fasase|fasase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasasothoth|fasasothoth]] || [[word:fasasojoj|fasasojoj]] || [[word:fasasoshosh|fasasoshosh]] || [[word:fasas|fasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasasotho|fasasotho]] || [[word:fasasojo|fasasojo]] || [[word:fasasosho|fasasosho]] || [[word:fasaso|fasaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasasofoth|fasasofoth]] || [[word:fasasofoj|fasasofoj]] || [[word:fasasofosh|fasasofosh]] || [[word:fasasof|fasasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fasasĂŠthĂŠ|fasasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fasasĂŠjĂŠ|fasasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fasasĂŠshĂŠ|fasasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fasasĂŠ|fasasĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasasathath|fasasathath]] || [[word:fasasajaj|fasasajaj]] || [[word:fasasashash|fasasashash]] || [[word:fasas|fasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasasatha|fasasatha]] || [[word:fasasaja|fasasaja]] || [[word:fasasasha|fasasasha]] || [[word:fasasa|fasasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasasafath|fasasafath]] || [[word:fasasafaj|fasasafaj]] || [[word:fasasafash|fasasafash]] || [[word:fasasaf|fasasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fasasasha|fasasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofasasasha|gofasasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifasasasha|gokifasasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fasasnĂŒsha|fasasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofasasnknĂŒsha|gofasasnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifasasnĂŒsha|gokifasasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fasashĂ«sha|fasashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofasasnkshĂ«sha|gofasasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifasashĂ«sha|gokifasashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fasasrosha|fasasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofasasnkrosha|gofasasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifasasrosha|gokifasasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fasasmusha|fasasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofasasnkmusha|gofasasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifasasmusha|gokifasasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fasasherasha|fasasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofasasnksherasha|gofasasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifasasherasha|gokifasasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fasasngasha|fasasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofasasnkngasha|gofasasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifasasngasha|gokifasasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fasasyasha|fasasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofasasnkyasha|gofasasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifasasyasha|gokifasasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fasasyamasha|fasasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofasasnkyamasha|gofasasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifasasyamasha|gokifasasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fasasnĂŒshĂ«sha|fasasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofasasnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gofasasnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifasasnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokifasasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fasasnĂŒrosha|fasasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofasasnknĂŒrosha|gofasasnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifasasnĂŒrosha|gokifasasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fasasnĂŒmusha|fasasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofasasnknĂŒmusha|gofasasnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifasasnĂŒmusha|gokifasasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fasashĂ«nĂŒsha|fasashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofasasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gofasasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifasashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokifasashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fasashĂ«rosha|fasashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofasasnkshĂ«rosha|gofasasnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifasashĂ«rosha|gokifasashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fasashĂ«musha|fasashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofasasnkshĂ«musha|gofasasnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifasashĂ«musha|gokifasashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fasasronĂŒsha|fasasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofasasnkronĂŒsha|gofasasnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifasasronĂŒsha|gokifasasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fasasroshĂ«sha|fasasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofasasnkroshĂ«sha|gofasasnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifasasroshĂ«sha|gokifasasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fasasromusha|fasasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofasasnkromusha|gofasasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifasasromusha|gokifasasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fasasmunĂŒsha|fasasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofasasnkmunĂŒsha|gofasasnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifasasmunĂŒsha|gokifasasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fasasmushĂ«sha|fasasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofasasnkmushĂ«sha|gofasasnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifasasmushĂ«sha|gokifasasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fasasmurosha|fasasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofasasnkmurosha|gofasasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifasasmurosha|gokifasasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fasas|fasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:fĂŠsĂŠs|fĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofasas|hofasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hofĂŠsĂŠs|hofĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofasas|hohofasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofĂŠsĂŠs|hohofĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒfasas|nĂŒfasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒfĂŠsĂŠs|nĂŒfĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfasas|nĂŒnĂŒfasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠsĂŠs|nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻfasas|nĂŻfasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻfĂŠsĂŠs|nĂŻfĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfasas|nĂŻnĂŻfasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠsĂŠs|nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufasas|lufasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lufĂŠsĂŠs|lufĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufasas|lulufasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufĂŠsĂŠs|lulufĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifasas|lifasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lifĂŠsĂŠs|lifĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifasas|lilifasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifĂŠsĂŠs|lilifĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofasas|kofasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kofĂŠsĂŠs|kofĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofasas|kokofasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofĂŠsĂŠs|kokofĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefasas|kefasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kefĂŠsĂŠs|kefĂŠsĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefasas|kekefasas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefĂŠsĂŠs|kekefĂŠsĂŠs]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
